reasoning: The market value on May 1 was 34%. Carson the Terrier is arguably the most accomplished small dog surfer of recent years, finishing 3rd in Top Dog in 2022 and 1st in 2023. However, he fell out of the Top 3 in 2024 (though he placed 2nd in the Small Dog division). One key downside is his age: articles from 2024 note he was an 8-year veteran of the sport and 10 years old, meaning he will be 11 for the 2025 competition. This advances dog aging risks, which likely explains his slight dip in performance against younger or larger dogs (like the 2024 winner, Cacau the Labrador). Given his age and the rise of international competitors, combined with the fact that he missed the podium last year, I estimate his chances of bouncing back into the overall Top 3 to be slightly lower than his peak years, though still substantial given his divisional dominance. I'm adjusting slightly downward from the recent market price of 34% to 32% to account for aging and increased difficulty.
